column1: 彼女は歌が上手なだけでなく、ダンスも一流だ。
column2: かのじょはうたがじょうずなだけでなく、だんすもいちりゅうだ。
column3: She is not only good at singing but also a top-class dancer.
column4: だけでなく〜も (not only A but also B)
column5: N/Adj + だけでなく + B + も
column6: adds an unexpected further quality beyond the stated one
column8: だけでなく〜も = N3; ばかりでなく〜も = similar; に限らず = formal
column10: module:03-n3 jlpt:n3 point:だけでなく-て-も complexity:standard frequency:top5k source:shin-kanzen source:authored frequency:low

column1: 日本語の勉強は聴解だけでなく、読み書きも大切だ。
column2: にほんごのべんきょうはちょうかいだけでなく、よみかきもたいせつだ。
column3: Japanese study requires not only listening but also reading and writing.
column5: N + だけでなく + N + も
column6: highlights that a subject requires multiple dimensions
column8: だけでなく commonly used to broaden scope beyond the obvious first point
column10: module:03-n3 jlpt:n3 point:だけでなく-て-も complexity:standard frequency:top5k source:shin-kanzen source:authored frequency:top10k

column1: この問題は経済的だけでなく、社会的な側面もある。
column2: このもんだいはけいざいてきだけでなく、しゃかいてきなそくめんもある。
column3: This issue has not only economic but also social aspects.
column5: Adj-な + だけでなく + additional dimension
column6: a problem or phenomenon has multiple layers
column8: だけでなく is used to add depth or breadth to an initial statement
column10: module:03-n3 jlpt:n3 point:だけでなく-て-も complexity:standard frequency:top5k source:shin-kanzen source:authored frequency:low

column1: 彼は優しいだけでなく、仕事もできる。
column2: かれはやさしいだけでなく、しごともできる。
column3: He is not only kind but also capable at work.
column5: Adj + だけでなく + further quality
column6: describes a person with multiple positive traits
column8: だけでなく often introduces a less obvious or more impressive second quality
column10: module:03-n3 jlpt:n3 point:だけでなく-て-も complexity:standard frequency:top5k source:shin-kanzen source:authored

column1: そのカフェは味がいいだけでなく、内装も素晴らしい。
column2: そのかふぇはあじがいいだけでなく、ないそうもすばらしい。
column3: Not only is that café delicious but its interior is also wonderful.
column5: N/Adj + だけでなく + separate merit
column6: adds a separate but equally impressive quality
column8: だけでなく used in recommendations/reviews to highlight multiple selling points
